title: Stainless Steel Pots and Pans Set – 17pcs Cookware with Glass Lids – Induction Hob Pot Set – Cooking Saucepan Pots & Frying Pan Set – by Nuovva
features: EXTENSIVE 17PC COOKWARE SET: Includes three frying pans (20cm, 24cm and 28cm with lid), one sauté pan with lid (24cm 2.5L), two saucepans with lids (16cm 1.3L and 20cm 2.7L), two stockpots with lids (24cm 4.3L and 28cm 7.2L), one Dutch oven with lid (24cm 2.5L), and a steamer insert. This complete set by Nuovva is perfect for frying, sautéing, boiling, steaming, slow cooking and more!

PREMIUM THREE LAYER DESIGN: Constructed with a tri-ply structure (304 stainless steel + aluminium + 430 stainless steel) for swift, even heat distribution and long-lasting durability, the aluminium core by Nuovva ensures effective cooking, while the satin-polished stainless steel interior and exterior provide a smooth, professional finish!

PRECISION COOKING: Each of our pot and pan with a lid features a tempered glass cover, allowing you to keep an eye on your food without lifting the lid, this helps retain heat, moisture, and flavour for improve cooking results. The stainless steel knob provides a sturdy grip for easy handling and matching sleek look!

SECURE & COMFORTABLE GRIP: Designed for safety and control, the riveted stainless steel handles offer a firm, stable grip while cooking. The heat-resistant design by Nuovva stays cool on the stovetop, ensuring comfortable handling even during high-heat cooking. Built for long-term durability, these handles combine strength with a streamlined, contemporary look!

UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY: Engineered to work on all stovetops, including induction, gas, electric, and open flame, this cookware set adapts to any kitchen setup. The satin-polished finish resists stains, rusting and makes cleaning simple. Dishwasher safe for effortless upkeep and long-lasting performance!

Even Heat Cooking The precision-engineered tri-ply base eliminates hot spots, ensuring perfectly balanced heat for accurate, reliable cooking. Naturally Non-Stick Surface The satin-polished stainless steel interior offers excellent food release and effortless cleanup—no coating required. Oven-Ready Performance Move seamlessly from hob to oven with confidence—built to handle high temperatures for all-in-one cooking convenience.
